response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, and his AI-agent and automation work aligns with nice-to-haves; however, his seniority far exceeds the junior/mid-level role, he lacks explicit mention of Nest.js or Kubernetes in professional contexts, and his German language barrier combined with high on-site requirements raises operational concerns.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and automation tooling
Active open-source contributions and deep understanding of software architecture
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role — risk of low retention or misalignment
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience despite required skills
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
